label: LTL Runtime Monitor
description: Bauer et al. (2011) finite-trace LTL: G(request → F response) on a 3-event trace where position 0 requests and position 1 responds — formula is satisfied.

expected.note: At position 0: request=T requires F(response) to hold; response=T at position 1 satisfies F. Positions 1 and 2: request=F, implication trivially true.
